creator: wgodfrey@ena.com
text:
Happened again on different server with the same hw configuration, same
OS, same software with very similar configuration.

 

Feb  7 10:25:09 netflow-dc1 savecore: reboot after panic: solaris
assert: 0 == dmu_buf_hold_array(os, object, offset, size, FA

LSE, FTAG, &numbufs, &dbp), file:
/usr/src/sys/modules/zfs/../../contrib/opensolaris/uts/common/fs/zfs/dmu
.c, line: 431

Feb  7 10:25:09 netflow-dc1 savecore: writing core to vmcore.2

 

Weldon
